goal: 记录 I3 实现线程启动

summary.title: 记录 I3 实现线程启动
summary.what: Recorded the actual I3 worker thread id and worktree path in the canonical workflow control plane.
summary.why: The orchestrator needs durable state so context compaction or thread handoff can continue from the correct I3 worker without relying on pending launcher ids.
summary.user_goal: 记录 I3 实现线程启动

decisions.rationale: Actual thread/worktree readback is authoritative; the launcher only returned a pending worktree id first.
rejected: Leaving I3 as TBD would make the next orchestrator turn search history again.

review_notes: Docs-only control-plane checkpoint; git diff --check passed before commit.

behavioral_changes: I3 worker is active and registered for follow-up reconciliation.
